programme.title: Total Drama Island
programme.desc: The campers compete in an awake-a-thon; Eva's mp3 player is stolen.

programme.title: Total Drama Island
programme.desc: The campers face off in the classic school-yard-blood-bath: dodge-ball. After losing two challenges in a row, The Killer Bass are the underdogs and do not expect to win.

programme.title: Total Drama Island
programme.desc: Chef Hatchet will use his Chef-O-Meter to vote on which team has the most talent and which team must send a player to the Loser Boat.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When a meteorite falls not far from the log cabin, strange berries start to grow. One of their properties is that they make anyone who eats them grow to disproportionate sizes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Under the wood floor of the log cabin, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover the entrance to an underground gallery with an old treasure card that indicates the location of a treasure.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he brandishes an Indian sceptre that the Lemmings brought home with other antique objects, Grizzy sees the Lemmings bow low before him and behave like servants.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy tries to impress the she-bear that he's in love with by making a sculpture of her from a piece of wood. But as soon as the artist's back is turned, the Lemmings gnaw at the work of art in order to transform it into a toboggan slide.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings throw a surprise birthday party for one of the clan. When Happy Birthday rings out, the surprise is as great for Grizzy, who is trying to take a nap after a hearty meal, as it is for the birthday Lemming hero in question.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A gust of wind sweeps away the flower that Grizzly's adored she-bear wears in her hair. Grizzly sees this as a golden opportunity to dazzle her by bringing it back.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds two identical vases that are actually communicating vessels in a Native American Indian chest. If he sticks his hand in one, it comes out the other, regardless of the distance between them.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a vintage stopwatch in the garage which lets one wind back the minute that has just passed by, and it can even stop time and movement in one's surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is disturbed in the middle of his TV snack by a flow of incongruous objects that have been transformed into hot-air balloons.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers with great delight that the ranger has purchased a brand new multi-function Stressless recliner. But the Lemmings transform it into a fearsome multi-game chair.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play kite surf with a homemade kite. Grizzly notices that the she-bear he's in love with watches the kite perform arabesques in the sky with admiration.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy snatches the last jar of chocolate spread out from under the noses of the Lemmings. In exchange, he offers them the toy stuck inside the lid, a mini-flute.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings play a new game, floating like flags in the breeze from the fan set on maximum. But Grizzy quickly rids the living room of this interference.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have a grand old time tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Grizzly remarks that the she-bear he's in love with is impressed by the Lemmings' construction and makes believe that it's his work of art.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings draw inspiration from lessons they find in a martial arts book and start breaking every wooden object they can get their hands on into two. When Grizzy tries to stop them, they go on to the next lesson and get him in a judo hold.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy dreams that he's a valiant knight who has delivered his beloved. As he is about to take her in his arms, he is woken by the Lemmings who have chosen this day to blast music.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy stands in front of the pantry, desperate. The stock of chocolate spread is completely depleted. He realises that the Lemmings are making some themselves, following a complicated recipe.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Inspired by a magazine with a jewellery ad showing a man offering a diamond to a woman, Grizzy imagines himself offering the ranger's engagement ring to his beloved she-bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: When he accidentally sticks a computer microprocessor to his temple, Grizzy is transformed into an exceptionally intelligent being capable of predicting events to come far in advance.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings prepare a dream afternoon snack with the last jar of chocolate spread in the cupboard. Tough luck, Grizzy is coming. Caught off guard, the Lemmings hide the jar in a teddy bear-pyjama case to slip away without arousing suspicion.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash, Misty, and Tracey set out to explore the Orange Islands, and Ash is determined to qualify for the Orange League! He soon learns that the Orange Crew challenges are a little different from the usual Gym battles.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash, Misty, and Tracey arrive at Mandarin Island, Pikachu and Togepi turn against them and join a group of other angry Pokémon. When the misbehaving Pokémon disappear, Officer Jenny informs them that dozens of Pokémon have been reported missing!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash discovers a message in a bottle, which prompts our heroes to embark on a new journey on Sunburst Island and a quest for a highly elusive Onix!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes find themselves on Pinkan Island, home to numerous strangely colored Pokémon. Ash and Tracey are fascinated by these pink Pokémon…and so are the Team Rocket trio!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After joining a scientific expedition to investigate a Kabuto fossil, Ash and their friends soon find themselves facing a series of natural disasters!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Another Water-type specialist challenges Misty to a battle and offers some advice: she thinks Misty's Psyduck might be ready to evolve!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a very busy Nurse Joy, who has to do some serious island-hopping to take care of all the Pokémon in the area! Can they help protect her from Team Rocket?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: In Ash's second challenge against the Orange Crew, he must climb a mountain, build a bobsled, and win a sled race! Do his Pokémon have what it takes to help him through these obstacles?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes' explorations take them to the seven Grapefruit Islands, where they learn that the islands' famous fruit has been disappearing! Ash, Misty, and Tracey set out to catch whoever's responsible.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When divers recover an ancient Orange League Championship trophy, our heroes head straight for the art museum where it's on display to check it out! Unfortunately, Team Rocket has beaten them to the punch…

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make models of heads out of clay. Dipsy is very pleased with himself when he discovers his eyes, mouth, nose and ears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa comes in through the door and up the slide to join the others and watch Christopher whose mum and dad look after poorly hedgehogs. A magical new event happens in Teletubbyland – Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa jumps indoors and then runs off to watch some children sing and act out the nursery rhyme 'Old King Cole'. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies act out their own version of 'Old King Cole'.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies ‘Christmas is a Coming’. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Bryony loves to play the violin. She talks about her violin and they plays 'Twinkle Twinkle Little Star'. The Teletubbies sit down to listen to some lovely music, but the Noo Noo is making too much noise.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a swapping places game among the hills. They watch a little girl paint a portrait of her mum. A book appears and Tinky Winky looks at the pictures in the book.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy is busy at the switch panel, when he remembers the snow. The Tubbies watch an international Christmas insert. The Teletubbies are walking very carefully because snow can be very slippery.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play with their favourite things, until the windmill shows them it's time to watch some children learn about the number one. The Teletubbies are supposed to be in bed, but they would rather play outside.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a game before watching some children playing a game with Alex Pascall. The Teletubbies have fun playing the game of waking and sleeping, before Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch as Andy Brown shows some children butterflies. The Teletubbies love to fly their kites and a strong wind blows Po all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Deadline

programme.desc: Quan Shu, Manchuria 1359 BC: The Chinese invent an explosive gift egg. New York, 2001: A rival beats Sydney and Nigel to a map leading to the Dragon's Egg.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Mr. Right

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: A hungry boy tries to steal food from the pilgrims. Monkey sees himself in the child’s mischief and learns compassion through forgiveness.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Troubled by dreams of his dying mother, Tripitaka questions his duty. The journey teaches him balance between love and spiritual purpose.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Monkey steals Heaven’s peaches, gains immortality, and battles officials. All are cast to Earth: Monkey trapped under rocks, Pigsy and Sandy cursed. Buddha decrees a holy man must fetch scriptures from India to save the world.

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: Kuan-yin seeks a holy man for the scripture quest, choosing young priest Hsüan Tsang, now Tripitaka. With Monkey’s magic staff, his powers, and a talking horse, their journey from China to India begins.

programme.title: Monkey

programme.title: Monkey
programme.desc: The pilgrims meet Golden Horn and Silver Horn. Pigsy is bewitched, Monkey is tested by an old woman, and Tripitaka and Sandy are captured. A Taoist magician turns the tide when Golden Horn loses his magic bottle.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Ironside investigates the fatal shooting of the son of Fran's divorced friend (Mary Ure); guests Clu Gulager, Herb Edelman.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A badly beaten attorney (James Olson) describes an unconscious man aboard a sinking boat.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A top-security scientist disappears and Ironside discovers an unexplained $50,000 in his bank account.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A couple (Sharon Gless, Russell Wiggins) disappears while throwing a "haunted house" party in an abandoned mansion.

programme.title: Ironside

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: An unknown axe murderer still stalks a family he brutally murdered a century ago and then next-door a spirit with a deadly secret haunts a young couple. An off the beaten path bar is stocked with other worldly spirits.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: An entity jumps into a woman's bed and lies down beside her; two sisters' ghosts roam a Civil War-era house; a castle built on an old Indian burial ground is haunted by its original owner; and more.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A man and his girlfriend dream of owning their own "haunted attraction," but end up owning an actual haunted house; and the ghostly voice of a passenger who died in a plane crash is heard in a chilling recording.

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A man lives in a home haunted by his father's angry spirit. In her new home, an Iraq war veteran hears whispers and is touched while asleep.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: That was so weird!
programme.desc: A beautiful old-but-haunted town hall, under the shadow of Pendle Hill, is investigated as the team visit Lancashire. Phil witnesses an unexplained figure, Dale gets an unwelcome surprise, and Sara does a vigil with a royal ‘guest’.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: There's knocking upstairs!

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Married To Madness

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Signed, Your Deadliest Fan
programme.desc: A successful comic book author and illustrator encounters a fan who wants far more than an autograph.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: In the Spotlight

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Fear F.M.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Deadly Envy

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death

programme.desc: A report on the October 2001 murder of Wall Street tycoon Ted Ammon who was embroiled in a bitter divorce battle with his wife Generosa who later died of breast cancer.

programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch

programme.desc: US police find the dismembered body parts of a missing woman in an alligator-infested creek. They must race to prove who was responsible for this killing.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A teenage girl disappears one night, and her body was found a month later five kilometres from her home. Despite the murderer leaving very little evidence behind, the police have enough to tie him to the crime.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a popular DJ is found murdered in a local garden, the cops race to find answers. With no other leads, the police turn to a blood spatter expert.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Robert Andrew and his wife Brenda were gunned down in their garage in an upscale neighbourhood in Oklahoma City. The forensic team hope to help find Robert's killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.desc: The women in Malcolm Webster’s life seemed prone to bad luck. One died in a car crash. Another suffered a mysterious illness. A third, a keen sailor, found her life jacket punctured. How long before police realised this was more than coincidence?

programme.desc: Stephen and Anne Searle were the grandparents at the helm of a large, close-knit family. But Stephen was having an affair, and Anne had been pushed to drink by her husband’s controlling behaviour. Neither was destined to enjoy a peaceful retirement.

programme.desc: Ann Marie and Anthony Anastasi had four children, a big house on a desirable street… and a younger lover living in their basement. It was a toxic love triangle, and one that was destined to end in tragedy.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife

programme.title: 72 Hours: Fat Bandit

programme.title: 72 Hours: Pointing to Murder
programme.desc: A withered corpse is found half-buried in a field beside a theme park. Too decayed to identify properly, detectives have only the leathery fingers of one hand to work from.

programme.title: Paranormal State: They Only Come Out at Night
programme.desc: Once night falls in a quaint?New England Town, a police officer's family is terrorized by demons.?PRS arrives just in time with the family ready to vacate their family home, rather than suffer the advances of these spirit creatures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Cemetery

programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.desc: When a woman has long scratch marks mysteriously appear on her back, PRS is called in to see if they are truly facing the devil. But her credibility is called into question, a struggle of another kind emerges for Ryan and the rest of the team.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Village Church Farm
programme.desc: A museum like no other, this small collection of antiquated buildings is said to be the home of several spirits. The team get more than they bargained for as objects move; strange noises are caught on camera and the best EVP response to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Old Nick Theatre
programme.desc: Once a prison and a police station and now a theatre the Old Nick is famous for its unexplained occurrences. Fred decides to summon up some extra help while objects move and something wants to make itself known.

programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Trina & Scorpio
programme.desc: Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved? (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Encounter
programme.desc: Guest star Elizabeth Ashley plays the alcoholic wife of a crime syndicate leader whose involvement in an intimidation racket and the cold-blooded murder of an employee puts the IMF team on his trail.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Underwater
programme.desc: Stolen gems worth seventy-five million dollars scheduled to be fenced to an underworld figure suddenly disappear and the ship on which they were being transported is blown up at sea bringing the IMF team into the picture.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Invasion
programme.desc: Guest star Kevin McCarthy plays the role of a highly-placed Defense Department advisor who has murdered an Air Force official and sold vital top-secret material about America's nuclear defenses to foreign powers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Blues
programme.desc: Barney poses as a prospective rock-music recording artist to get evidence linking an organized crime figurehead played by guest star William Windom to the sudden death of a beautiful recording star who was being blackmailed by the syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Visitors
programme.desc: Guest star Steve Forrest plays the role of a millionaire publisher and communications tycoon who has sold fifty-one percent of his empire to an underworld crime syndicate which gives them a powerful influence over state politics.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hall of Fame Game
programme.desc: Allen heads to an auction with Elle, while Ton and Big Sis revamp the shop to help bring in more customers. Allen unearths a Ouija board and a set of antique basketballs, and goes toe-to-toe with an NBA Hall of Famer.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Party Gras
programme.desc: On a trip to New Orleans, Ton and Allen look to mix business with pleasure. They wage war with some locals at a tough auction, win a Mardi Gras unit that contains a confetti blaster and a modern calliope, then hit the town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci and Ryan clash over Bentley attending preschool, Tyler pressures Catelynn to enrol in college and after completing two months in rehab, Amber finally heads back home. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Maci and Kyle contemplate buying a house, Farrah introduces Sophia to her new boyfriend and Amber struggles to find a way to see her daughter. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah introduces her boyfriend to Debra, Catelynn supports her own mom as Tyler's dad goes to court and Bentley has a hard time adjusting to Maci's new house. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: In a visit to Texas, Farrah challenges Daniel about their relationship, Maci and Ryan argue about Ryan's new girlfriend and Amber looks for a new home for her and Leah. (S4, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Bentley's birthday leads to a blowout between Maci and Ryan, Farrah spends time with Sophia before saying goodbye for a month and Amber and Gary come up with a custody plan for Leah. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Amber has second thoughts about giving Gary full custody, Catelynn helps Tyler cope with emotions about his dad and they both reflect on the adoption, and Farrah misses Sophia. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Cortney the father of Brittany’s kids? According to his sister, Brittany cheated with her fiancé Clifton! Later, Melissa claims that her ex-husband didn’t father her twins and Sean’s the dad! Will the DNA results confirm this?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Pre-Wedding Cheating Scandals!
programme.desc: Shenik and Shenequa were united on Maury’s show last year after a DNA test. But is Shenik now sleeping with her sister’s man? Plus, the only thing that stands in the way of these couples tying the knot are their lie detector test results!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Mom, Your Man is a Cheater!
programme.desc: New mom Danica received 5 different emails from 5 women claiming that they slept with her man Jimmy in her home. Then, will Renee's man choose his addiction over his family?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Dashawn and his mom claim that it was only a one-time fling with Monica and he can’t be the father of her child! Then, party girl April wants to find out who fathered her baby! Later, is Frederick or Jason the father of Marietta’s baby?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Outrageous Merry Maury Updates!
programme.desc: Maury is celebrating the holidays with some good ‘olé story-telling by the fireplace. He’ll share the stories of past guests that came for paternity tests, lie detectors and more. Find out if these guests have been naughty or nice!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With Your Dad…Is He My Baby's Father?
programme.desc: After taking 5 DNA tests, Rebecca is back with 2 more men to find the father of her new baby! Then, Don and his wife were happy to find out that their son didn’t father Jessica’s baby, but they’re back because she thinks Don is the dad!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18

programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PARANORMAL ACTIVITIES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at paranormal activities including apparitions and ghosts, the dark day mystery, Marian Apparitions, curses, warnings from beyond, spontaneous combustion.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: ANCIENT MEGASTRUCTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at ancient megastructures including the Olmec Heads of Central America, Moai of Eastern Island, Petra in modern day Jordan, the Alhambra in Spain, Angkor Wat in Cambodia, Chichen Itza.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS TEXTS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries related to ancient texts including the Egyptian Book of the Dead, the Torah, the Secrets of Fulcanelli, the Tao Te Ching, the Vedas.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF ANCIENT CULTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries associated with ancient cultures including Lemuria, the Indus Valley civilization of Harappa, the Forgotten Kingdoms of Tibet, the Olmec civilization of Central America.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: RELICS OF THE SAINT
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the relics of the saints including the Shrine of the Three Kings, the Tilman of Our Lady of Guadalupe, the Holy Foreskin, the Ark of the Covenant, the Remain of Mary Magdalene, Buddha's Tooth, and the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET CULTS AND ORDERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at secret cults and mysterious orders including Skull and Bones at Yale University, the Freemasons, Thule and Vril Societies, the Bullingdon Club, the Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SCIENCE AND MYSTERIES FOR 21. CENTURY
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at some of the mysteries of modern science including memory of water, reincarnation, the beginning of life, hypnosis, the secrets of Morphic fields, time travel, why we must sleep.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: A picture-perfect Canadian couple Karla Homolka and Paul Bernardo join to perform torture and mutilation on young victims - crimes that are virtually unspeakable. Two teenage girls were raped and murdered, and the couple even filmed themselves doing it.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In July 2000, Sarah Payne is abducted and murdered. Roy Whiting, a convicted sex offender, is found guilty and sentenced to life in 2001. Sarah’s case leads to the implementation of “Sarah’s Law” in the UK in 2011.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 27, 2005, Dennis Rader, known as the BTK killer, pleads guilty to ten murders he committed in Wichita, Kansas, from 1974 to 1994. After a journalist's article reignites the case, Rader is arrested and sentenced to ten life terms without parole.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2001, British traveler Peter Falconio is presumed murdered in the Australian outback. Joanne Lees survives the attack, and Bradley John Murdoch is convicted of the murder in 2005. Peter's body is never found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In February 1977, Australian heiress Janie Shepherd vanishes in London. David Lashley, a convicted rapist, later confesses to her murder in prison. In 1990, he is convicted based on this confession and sentenced to life.

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In the series finale, it's all out war at the Commandos when dominant male Zorro goes missing in action.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: In the northern hemisphere, forests are adapted to the extreme seasonality of very cold winters and hot, humid summers.

programme.title: Jungle Planet

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Behind the Hunt
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: God Looks on the Heart
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Big Brother
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk hold the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mid-Course Correction
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby's Back in Town
programme.desc: Dog tries to nab a fugitive, named Wayne, by calling and telling him that he's won a new vacuum cleaner and he should stick around to get it. Dog then sends his daughter, Lyssa, to "deliver" the vacuum cleaner and lure Wayne out of his house.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surprise! Surprise!
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Ice in Paradise
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fathers in Law
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bosco the Clown
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.desc: Curse of the Mayan Treasure: An explorer at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by an underwater fog, thousands of fish jump to their deaths, and a UFO is spotted in LA skies.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: The Beast That Ate Jaws: A shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, and experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is filmed near Russia's Area 51.

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Strange Evidence

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of Poland
programme.desc: German tanks roll into Poland in September 1939.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Norway (Early 1940)

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Bombing of England (Fall 1940)
programme.desc: After invading France, Hitler is planning to cross the Channel. His only obstacle is the Royal Air Force. Throughout the summer of 1940, both sides lose an incredible number of daring flyers.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Tobruk
programme.desc: German field marshal Erwin Rommel scores a major victory at the Libyan seaport of Tobruk.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Operation Mercury
programme.desc: After British forces withdrew in defeat from Greece to the island of Crete in early 1941, they were soon fighting German invasion armies again. This time, 5,000 of Hitler's elite paratroopers landed to complete their conquest in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Malta (June 1941)
programme.desc: In 1941, Mussolini desperately wants to wrest the tiny island of Malta from the British for control of the Mediterranean. When his inadequate air force fails to bomb the Maltese into submission, Hitler's Luftwaffe joins the campaign.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Fall of Singapore (October 1941)
programme.desc: Before the sneak attack on Pearl Harbor, the Japanese initiate the Pacific War by firing on the British in Malaya. Their route to the rubber-rich nation takes them into Singapore, the World's most armed fortress.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Pearl Harbor (December 7, 1941)
programme.desc: During a two-hour surprise attack on the American Pacific fleet anchored at Pearl Harbor, Japanese navy pilots score a near-complete victory.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of the Philippines
programme.desc: Examining the Japanese invasion of the Philippines in December 1941.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: The Battle of Midway (June 2, 1942)

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Faster Than The Enemy

programme.desc: Talking to adults makes George want to hide! When he learns he must go to a grown-up party, he turns to his friends for help. Then, Arthur and his friends learn that old silent films can be just as much fun as the movies they’re used to.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings prepare a dream afternoon snack with the last jar of chocolate spread in the cupboard. Tough luck, Grizzy is coming. Caught off guard, the Lemmings hide the jar in a teddy bear-pyjama case to slip away without arousing suspicion.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy gleefully discovers that he can print images taken with the ranger's camera as it's connected to a state-of-the-art printer. He decides to frame himself, but when the time comes to print his portrait, there's no more paper in the printer.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A van pulls up to the ranger's cabin to deliver a full crate of jars of chocolate spread. While Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a wrecking bar to open it, someone steals the crate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: As usual, Grizzly picks the door of the Ranger's log cabin to come in and make himself comfortable, but this time it's impossible to enter. The Lemmings have requisitioned the cabin for a party and barricaded themselves inside.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have got their hands on some white beans which have very strange properties, when mixed with soda anyone who eats them turns into a bouncing ball. Grizzy realises that if he wants to have a nap, he must get rid of the magic beans.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy wants to get rid of the old piano in the garage at any cost, for the Lemmings love using it to make a dissonant racket. But when he notices a she-bear he's in love with likes the melody of Fur Elise, he decides to learn the piece.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings inherit a crate that fell off a Canadian army convoy transporting ultra-secret material. The case inside the crate emits a sort of laser beam that divides objects into multiple miniaturised versions of themselves.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty is not pleased when our heroes land on an island swarming with Bug-type Pokémon, though Ash and Tracey are having a blast. When they find an injured Scyther, can Misty overcome her disgust and help out?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: When Ash and friends find a wonderful island brimming with many kinds of fruit trees, they decide to take a break and enjoy the bounty! Of course, Team Rocket has other ideas…

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a couple of Trainers who don't seem to get along at all, even though their Nidoran are obviously smitten with each other. Misty is determined to solve this romantic challenge!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: In Trovitopolis City, Ash and friends hear stories about some kind of monster that's been scaring everyone—and when the ground cracks open and dumps them in the sewer, it seems they might meet this monster face to face!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After Misty dives into a whirlpool to rescue a girl, she learns that the girl's brother, Rudy, has a giant crush on her. Things get more complicated when it turns out he's also the Gym Leader Ash must challenge next!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash and friends go in search of super-sized Pokémon, but when they fall for a Team Rocket trick, and then Pikachu and Meowth get snatched up by a giant Pidgeot, everyone must work together to get them back!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: After hearing about Ash from the Trovita Island Gym Leader, another Trainer seeks him out for a battle...and after Pikachu is knocked out, Ash turns to his Charizard. But can he get the unruly Pokémon to listen to him?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch as Andy Brown shows some children butterflies. The Teletubbies love to fly their kites and a strong wind blows Po all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children learn about the number four, and the Teletubbies decide to go into the house. One by one, they leave. So, who is in the house?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for the Teletubbies. The Teletubbies watch some children feeding the ducks. Po finds a new trick to play with Tubby Toast. Three ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.desc: Some children recite and act out a nursery rhyme. In Teletubbyland Po follows Tinky Winky, they go over the hills, along the path, between the trees, into the house, around the toaster and into bed.
